topStories.title: Bitcoin's star fades, as investors flock to lustre of AI and megacap IPOs
topStories.summary: After more than a decade, Bitcoin finds itself in a downturn unlike any spring we've seen before. Its value has plummeted as AI stocks surge, and with fresh market listings on the horizon, investors are reallocating their resources. Many are choosing to withdraw from Bitcoin ETFs, shifting their focus to the burgeoning semiconductor sector.

topStories.title: Lululemon shares drop as forecast cut spotlights challenges for incoming CEO
topStories.summary: Lululemon faced a notable dip in its stock price as the athleisure retailer adjusted its profit expectations for the year. This news has escalated concerns among investors regarding the company's ability to bounce back. The incoming CEO will face a myriad of challenges, as reports suggest a decline in the brand's overall momentum.

topStories.title: Franklin Resources' Wamco to pay $100 million SEC fine over former star manager's trades
topStories.summary: Western Asset Management, a unit of Franklin Resources, will pay $100 million to settle SEC charges tied to a $600 million cherry-picking scheme by former CIO Kenneth Leech. The firm did not admit wrongdoing. Leech faces criminal trial, while regulators cited failures in oversight and fair trade allocation practices.

International students also play a crucial role in this entrepreneurial surge.
